"gTT% 3T$ 3T3TI3T 3^ OTV 1? *T3T33 ^^3 W&K $ 3J? t?f33 I [33.;S. 11/21022/10(1 )/2010-33r#-IH] MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th October, 2011 S.0.2445(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 40 of the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act, 2010 (42 of 2010), the Central Government hereby authorises the following officers for according previous sanction as required under the said section, namely:— .. i (i) the Union Home Secretary in respect of offences investigated by the Central Bureau of' Investigation; {ii) the Home Secretary of the State Government. concerned, in respect of offences investigated by the Investigating Agencies (Crime Branch) .of the State Governments. : • -' : [F.No.II/21022/IO(l')/2010-FC-IIl] GV.V. Wtf, :Hg33 BT33 3971GI/20I1 ' (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA.: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] • NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27thOctober,.20H S.0.2446(E).—In exercise of thepowers conferred by Section 43 of the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act, 2010 (42 of 2010), the Centra! Government hereby' specifies that the officers not below the rank oTSiibr Inspectorof Police ofthe following organisations shall be the authorities for investigation of offences punishable ' under the said Act:— (0 . Investigating Agencies (Crime Branch) of the State Governments, causeof action which arises in their respective States in respect of the offences that involve a prima facie violation of the provisions of the Foreign Contribution . .:(Reguiation)Act)2010(42of2010)withregard to receipt of foreign contribution of an amount of less than one crore rupees or equivalent; (ii) Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) with regard . to.offences that involve a prima facie violation • ofthe provisions ofthe Foreign-Contribution (Regulation)'Act, 2010 (42 of 2010) involving . receipt of foreign contribution of an amount of • one crore rupees or. equivalent or above and.in any other case which may be specifically entrusted to the CBI by the Central Government under.the said Act. .'•'' , . [F. No. 11/21022/10(1 )/201.0-FC-IH] GVV. SARMA, Jt.
